reasons: Franco's suppression stops Alucard from attacking and lifestealing during his sustain window.

proof.summary: Alucard needs to keep attacking to lifesteal, while Franco's ultimate suppresses him and creates a burst window before he can heal.
worksBestWhen: Franco saves ultimate for Alucard's dive.
Alucard is locked before he can lifesteal.
failureCases: Franco misses hook or wastes ultimate.
Alucard waits until Franco's suppression is used.

reasons: Kaja can suppress and drag Alucard out of his sustain window for team burst.

proof.summary: Alucard wants to dive and heal through continuous attacks, while Kaja can suppress and drag him into team damage before he sustains.
worksBestWhen: Kaja uses ultimate when Alucard dives.
Kaja drags Alucard into team damage.
failureCases: Kaja uses ultimate on the wrong target.

reasons: Akai can push Alucard away from targets during the lifesteal window.

proof.summary: Alucard heals by continuously attacking, while Akai can push him away from targets and break his damage and lifesteal uptime.
worksBestWhen: Akai uses ultimate after Alucard commits.
Akai pushes Alucard away from squishy teammates.
Team damages Alucard while he is displaced.
failureCases: Akai pushes Alucard toward allies by mistake.

reasons: Karrie can melt Alucard with repeated true damage while using positioning and Wind of Nature.

proof.summary: Alucard is a melee sustain fighter, while Karrie can deal repeated true damage from range and use positioning or Wind of Nature against his physical burst.
worksBestWhen: Karrie uses Wind of Nature at the correct time.
Alucard is forced to chase through frontline.
failureCases: Alucard reaches Karrie before Wind of Nature is used.
Wind of Nature is on cooldown.

reasons: Baxia reduces Alucard's lifesteal and sustain value during extended fights.

proof.summary: Alucard depends heavily on lifesteal and sustain, while Baxia can reduce HP regen effects and make his healing less effective.
worksBestWhen: Baxia applies anti-regen while Alucard is fighting.
Team focuses Alucard during reduced healing.
Baxia builds enough durability to survive Alucard's damage.
failureCases: Alucard avoids Baxia and dives backline.
